title: Friendly Brachiosaurus Baby Coloring Page
seoTitle: Easy Friendly Brachiosaurus Baby Coloring Page - Free PDF | ColoringPalace
seoDescription: Download and print this easy friendly brachiosaurus baby coloring sheet. Perfect for toddlers and young kids with thick outlines and large coloring spaces. High-resolution free vector PDF.
author: Antigravity Agent
funFacts: Unlike many other sauropods, Brachiosaurus had nostrils located on the top of its head, which once led scientists to think it lived underwater.
Brachiosaurus was one of the tallest dinosaurs, possessing long forelimbs that elevated its shoulders high above its hips.
